title: Permission name without module identifier
description: CreatePermission() or CheckPermission() uses a generic permission name without the module name, risking collision with core or other module permissions.
explanation: CMSMS permissions are global. A permission named 'edit' or 'admin' will collide. The convention is 'Manage ModuleName' or 'Use ModuleName'.
fix: Use the pattern 'Manage ModuleName' or 'Use ModuleName' for permission names.

examples.good:
CreatePermission('Manage MyModule', 'Manage MyModule settings');
CheckPermission('Manage MyModule');
